name: end2endtechnologies
message: End 2 End Technologies was founded 1999, as a low-voltage cabling company. Since that time, the needs of the clients has eclipsed from racks, trays, and cables. Networks are remote, computing is in the cloud, devices are wireless, and the clients are mobile. The company specializes in Network Infrastructure, Wireless, Security & Access Control, Intercom & Paging, Audio Visual, and E-Rate Provider. The company is based in Gilbert, Arizona with another office in Las Vegas, Nevada.
